title: Health Canada public engagement resource centre - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada public engagement resource centre
The resource centre includes links to Government of Canada policies that are relevant to public engagement activities and other Government of Canada websites which list current and past consultations.

## Government of Canada Policies
- Aboriginal Consultation and Accommodation - Updated Guidelines for Federal Officials to Fulfill the Duty to Consult - March 2011
- Cabinet Directive on Regulatory Management
- Communications Policy of the Government of Canada
- Guidelines for Effective Regulatory Consultations
- Health Canada and the Public Health Agency of Canada Guidelines on Public Engagement
- Health Canada Policy on External Advisory Bodies (2022)

## Government of Canada Consultations
- Consulting With Canadians
